query: What is the business activity of company De Duurzame Adviseurs (Use the website https://deduurzameadviseurs.nl/ as your starting point)?Please focus on the positioning on the value chain, the product & services and the end-markets served.Please write paragraph-style starting with [company name] is .... Maintain proper hierarchy of information and keep a neutral tone, sticking to facts and avoiding marketing lingo.Answer in English.
answer:
{"answer": "De Duurzame Adviseurs is a Dutch sustainability consultancy founded in 2011 and headquartered in Amersfoort, the Netherlands (KvK 64985520). The company operates as an advisory services provider in the sustainability value chain, positioned between regulatory frameworks and certification standards on the one hand, and organizations seeking to comply with or implement those standards on the other. Rather than producing physical goods or conducting audits, De Duurzame Adviseurs translates regulatory requirements and sustainability frameworks into practical strategies, action plans, and certification support for its clients. The firm employs a "Data, Drive & Actie" methodology, which involves baselining organizational sustainability data, formulating strategic choices, and converting these into actionable implementation plans. Since April 2026, De Duurzame Adviseurs has been part of Apave Impact, a French international organization, combining its domestic market position with a broader global network.

The company's service portfolio is organized around three main pillars. The first pillar, CO2 Reduction, includes carbon footprint calculations, guidance on CO2-Prestatieladder certification (for both the Netherlands and Belgium), and broader CO2 reduction advisory. De Duurzame Adviseurs positions itself as the market leader in CO2-Prestatieladder certification support. The second pillar, ESG Advisory, covers ESG strategy and action plan development, VSME (Voluntary SME) sustainability reporting, EcoVadis rating improvement support, circular economy implementation, and B Corp certification guidance. The third pillar, CSRD Compliance, provides full implementation support for the Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive, including a dedicated "CSRD Kickstart" program designed to initiate the reporting process for organizations. Across these pillars, the firm has completed over 5,000 trajectories for more than 800 organizations over its 15+ years of operation.

De Duurzame Adviseurs serves two primary end-markets: private-sector companies ("bedrijven") and public-sector governments ("overheden"). Within these markets, the firm concentrates on three specific sectors: Construction & Infrastructure (Bouw & Infra), Manufacturing & Production (Maak & Productie), and the Government sector. The company collaborates with industry bodies such as Bouwend Nederland and FME to develop sector-tailored services. It has also expanded its geographic reach into the Belgian market, offering CO2-Prestatieladder certification support there. The firm reports serving over 1,500 organizations, including more than 63 government bodies and municipalities, with a stated client satisfaction score of 8.5 out of 10.
